fileDecisions.decision: Merge both APIs into one module; retain primitive components, add typed catalog data interfaces, and avoid the AdsCard component/type collision by exporting AdsCatalogCard as the structured union.
Preserve primitive-composition coverage and keep a direct catalog story so both public entry styles remain inspectable.
Keep the catalog-driven AdsSurface and remove one-off primitive composition from the preview.

audit.mergeDirection: Keep the branch-introduced low-level Ads primitives, layer in mainline AdsCatalog and typed slot/card data, and keep MockupPreviews consuming the shared catalog surface.
risks: The structured poster payload must be adapted to the primitive-driven renderer to avoid mismatched figure and stanza shapes.
The conflicted files remain unmerged in git until the resolved versions are staged.

instructions: Preserve the low-level Ads primitive surface introduced on the branch.
Preserve the higher-level AdsCatalog and typed data-driven surface from main.
Avoid name collisions between component exports and type exports.
Keep MockupPreviews on the shared catalog-driven surface where that pattern already exists.
Return the concrete changed files and a short summary of the merged decisions.
prompt.outputFormat:
JSON with:
  changedFiles: string[],
  stagedFiles: string[],
  summary: string,
  residualRisks: string[]
prompt.role: frontend engineer resolving a careful brownfield rebase conflict
prompt.task: Resolve the requested conflicted files and stage them for rebase continuation.

description: Merge the Ads primitives, story, and preview surfaces without losing either the primitive or catalog layers.
title: Resolve ads/mockup rebase conflicts
